name: 360Learning LMS API
what_it_does: 360Learning REST API for collaborative learning platform. Enables AI agents to manage learner provisioning, enroll users in programs, track completions and assessment scores, retrieve learning analytics, and integrate 360Learning into HRIS and HR workflow automation. 360Learning is differentiated by its collaborative, peer-learning approach where subject matter experts create and update content.
use_cases: Provisioning learner accounts from HR onboarding automation agents
Enrolling employees in programs from L&D operations agents
Tracking learning completions and certification status from compliance agents
Integrating 360Learning data into HRIS and performance management agents
not_for: Traditional top-down corporate training without collaborative element
Consumer e-learning without enterprise team context
best_when: An organization using 360Learning wants AI agents to automate learner provisioning, track program completions, and integrate collaborative learning data into HRIS and performance workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Employee learning performance data and peer feedback require careful handling per employment law and GDPR.

auth.notes: 360Learning API uses API key authentication. Keys are company-scoped and available in 360Learning admin settings. Simple Bearer token auth.

pricing.paid_tiers: Team and Business plans with pricing per active user
pricing.notes: Paris-based company with EU-native design. Pricing varies by team size and plan.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; contact 360Learning for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Employee learning and peer feedback data requires employment law compliance
No public MCP server — REST API with API key auth
French company — GDPR native, strong EU data residency commitment
360Learning's collaborative model means content can be created by any employee — understand permissions
API covers core CRUD operations but advanced collaborative features may require UI interaction
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Employee learning and peer feedback data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR native (French company). API key auth. EU data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee learning and peer feedback. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR (French native). API key auth. EU-first.
